ops.text: {"config":{"base_model_pick":"Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B","base_model_pick_rationale":"Live get_server_capabilities() menu for this account (26 models) has no Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 (docs model-lineup lists it, but it is not live here); Qwen3.5-4B is the only ~4B Qwen dense option and the closest-in-spirit live match to the local base (compact ~4B, Qwen, non-thinking once disable-thinking rendering is used).","cell":"tinker_pilot_run","cell_base":"Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B","cookbook_wall":"tinker-cookbook pins transformers<=5.5.4 but the lab pins transformers>=5.12,<5.13 (mlx-lm 0.31.3), so only the lightweight `tinker` SDK is added to the lab venv; datum construction is replicated with the raw SDK + the local tokenizer.","data_use_policy":"Your data is used solely to fine-tune your models. We do not use your data to train our own models. (thinkingmachines.ai/tinker)","experiment":"E8-generation","gate_metric":"sentinel-first-token AUC = roc_auc_score(labels, 1 - P(NO_STEER)) over valid.jsonl, same logic as harness.watcher_lora.LocalWatcher.nosteer_prob, evaluated via Tinker compute_logprobs on the trained model (bf16 serving).","hyperparameters":{"batch_size":4,"checkpoints":[250,500],"effective_scale_alpha_over_r":2.0,"fine_tune_type":"lora","learning_rate":0.0001,"lora_alpha":32,"optimizer":"adam","rank":16,"seed":1729,"steps":500,"target_modules":"all-linear (Tinker default: train_mlp+train_attn+train_unembed)"},"live_menu_discrepancy":"Live get_server_capabilities() menu for this account (26 models) has no Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 (docs model-lineup lists it, but it is not live here); Qwen3.5-4B is the only ~4B Qwen dense option and the closest-in-spirit live match to the local base (compact ~4B, Qwen, non-thinking once disable-thinking rendering is used).","local_base_for_reference":"mlx-community/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507-4bit (the E8 local recipe base; differs from the Tinker pick)","local_serving_build":"mlx-community/Qwen3.5-4B-4bit (HF, verified present)","local_serving_wall":"Tinker's Qwen3.5-4B LoRA uses SPLIT linear_attn in_proj_q/k/v; mlx-lm's qwen3_5 GatedDeltaNet uses a FUSED in_proj_qkv, so the split rank-16 adapter cannot be applied to mlx-lm as-is. MLP / self_attn / out_proj / in_proj_z map cleanly; a faithful local 4-bit serve needs a merge+requantize (build_hf_model) step, so the gate AUC is measured on Tinker's sampler instead of local MLX.","pricing_usd_per_million_tokens":{"Qwen3-8B":{"prefill":0.13,"sample":0.4,"train":0.4},"Qwen3.5-4B":{"prefill":0.22,"sample":0.67,"train":0.67},"source":"https://thinkingmachines.ai/tinker/ pricing table"},"provider":"Tinker (Thinking Machines managed LoRA training API)","rejected_alternatives":{"Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507":"true non-thinking Instruct-2507 spirit but 30B MoE, wrong size class / heavy local serving","Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507":"ideal exact match but NOT in this account's live menu","Qwen/Qwen3-8B":"standard-attention (clean mlx adapter serving) but 8B = 2x target size, not compact","Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B(-Base)":"9B, larger; Base variant not instruct","meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B":"compact 3B but BASE (not instruct) and Llama family, further from the Qwen3 instruct base"},"renderer":"local mlx-community/Qwen3.5-4B-4bit chat template, enable_thinking=false (injects an empty <think></think> before the answer, matching the local 2507 base scaffold)","run":{"base_model":"Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B","batch_size":4,"checkpoints":{"250":"tinker://aea49bf7-1541-54d0-a019-fb73d375332e:train:0/sampler_weights/step250","500":"tinker://aea49bf7-1541-54d0-a019-fb73d375332e:train:0/sampler_weights/step500"},"final_loss":0.9671199917793274,"learning_rate":0.0001,"rank":16,"run_id":"Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B","seed":1729,"steps":500,"train_cost_usd":2.1394,"train_tokens":3193089,"wall_s":2072.3},"seed":1729,"sources":{"cookbook":"https://github.com/thinking-machines-lab/tinker-cookbook","data_use_policy":"https://thinkingmachines.ai/tinker/","mlx_builds":"huggingface.co/mlx-community/{Qwen3.5-4B-4bit,Qwen3-8B-4bit}","model_lineup_docs":"https://tinker-docs.thinkingmachines.ai/model-lineup","model_lineup_live":"tinker get_server_capabilities(): 26 models; no Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507; only ~4B dense = Qwen3.5-4B","pricing":"https://thinkingmachines.ai/tinker/"},"spend_cap_usd":60,"train_data":"adapters/watcher-lora-e8/mlx_data/train.jsonl (materialized render-v2 chat, prompt-masked on the assistant completion)","valid_data":"adapters/watcher-lora-e8/mlx_data/valid.jsonl (200 rows, label-stratified)"},"config_hash":"b0117ae5ce14","dataset_digest":"415281275e0b9c10","experiment":"E8-generation","metrics":{"baseline_best_auc":0.816,"n_val":200.0,"tinker_auc__step250":0.9012460096797444,"tinker_auc__step500":0.9019668417258778,"tinker_sampler_best_auc":0.9019668417258778,"train_cost_usd":2.1394},"seed":1729,"verdict":"training PASS / local-serve BLOCKED: Qwen3.5-4B Tinker-sampler AUC 0.9020 (local E8 baseline 0.8160) shows training works, but the split linear_attn.in_proj_q/k/v LoRA cannot load into mlx-lm's fused in_proj_qkv; local 4-bit serving needs a merge+requantize. Not adopted for this base."}
